hero.subtitle1: Your kitchen is already there. Your regular customers too.
hero.subtitle2: With Gastro Master you reach them at home — without Lieferando, without commission.
hero.geoTitle: What does own delivery service mean?
hero.geoText: Your own delivery service means: Your customers order directly from you — through your own ordering shop or your own app. You pay no commission to Lieferando, Wolt, or Uber Eats. The customer data belongs to you. You decide on prices, delivery areas, and opening hours. Gastro Master provides the complete technology — from €69 per month, no hidden fees.
hero.newcomerText: Don't have your own place yet?

problem.title: You have regular customers — but can you reach them at home?
problem.text: These three problems stand in the way of your own delivery service.

items.title: Phone and paper
items.text: Customers call. You write everything on paper. Mistakes happen. Orders get lost. That costs you time and money.

items.title: 30 % commission to Lieferando
items.text: You're on Lieferando — but the platform keeps 30 % of every order. At €3,000 revenue, you lose up to €900 per month.

items.title: Technology is unclear
items.text: You want to deliver yourself, but don't know how. Own app, own shop — sounds complicated. It's not. We do it for you.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about your own delivery service
faq.text: Simple answers — so you can get started right away.

items.q: How do I offer a delivery service in my restaurant?
items.a: You need an [online ordering system](/produkte/webshop). With it, your customers can order directly from you. Gastro Master sets it up for you — with your logo, your colors, your menu. Everything runs through your system. No commission to Lieferando. More about the [delivery solution](/loesungen/lieferdienst).

items.q: What does an own ordering system for delivery services cost?
items.a: The [ordering shop from Gastro Master](/produkte/webshop) costs from €79 per month. Your shop is set up with your branding. You pay no commission — every order is 100 % yours. We set everything up for you. You don't have to program anything yourself.

items.q: How much commission does Lieferando take?
items.a: Lieferando takes 13 % if you have your own drivers. With Lieferando drivers, it's up to 30 %. At €3,000 monthly revenue, you pay up to €900 commission — every month. That's money you could keep.

items.q: Is your own delivery service worth it instead of Lieferando?
items.a: Yes — especially if you already have regular customers. Your regulars are happy to order directly from you. You keep all data, you keep control. And you pay no commission. Especially for dishes with low food costs — like pizza or sushi — your own [delivery service](/loesungen/lieferdienst) is very worthwhile.

items.q: Do I need my own app for my delivery service?
items.a: Not necessarily. The [ordering shop](/produkte/webshop) works without an app — in the browser, on the phone. But a dedicated [app](/produkte/app) has a big advantage: regular customers order with one click. They see your logo on their phone. That strengthens the bond with your restaurant.

cta.title: We help you start your delivery service.
